uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid ('Areco Schedule B', continuation of p.122/123): each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). This sheet shows only data columns; the left-hand ROW-LABEL column (Amount of Transaction A-L, Type of Transaction, Capital Gain, Transaction Date) is off-page on the preceding sheet (p.122). Header rows give EIF marker (only cols 3-6 BLACKROCK/MCSXX) + owner (DC/SP) + asset name + ticker + Transaction type (P/S(Part)/S); the amount matrix and Capital Gain rows are unlabeled here and degraded (X marks are dark bars), so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured; dates are the bottom row.
uncertainties.note: use the p.122 'Areco Schedule B' A-L bucket/Type/Capital-Gain label key to resolve amounts by row position
